name: infa-job-management-mcp-server
title: Informatica Job Management MCP Server
summary: Provides the capability to orchestrate, monitor, and manage the lifecycle of data integration tasks leveraging IDMC runtime APIs
description: Provides the capability to orchestrate, monitor, and manage the lifecycle of data integration tasks leveraging IDMC runtime APIs.

useCases.name: Self-Healing Pipelines
useCases.description: Allows AI agents to monitor a failed job and automatically attempt a restart or trigger a notification based on the error log.

useCases.name: Event-Driven Integration
useCases.description: Enables AI agents to trigger specific data loads automatically when a business event (like a new file arrival) is detected.

useCases.name: Workflow Monitoring
useCases.description: Allows users to ask the AI for a 'status report' on their daily data loads without logging into the IDMC console.

useCases.name: Resource Optimization
useCases.description: Enables AI agents to identify and stop long-running or stalled jobs that are consuming excessive Secure Agent resources.

idmcOauthJobManagement.description: Authenticate with Informatica OAuth2 authorization server using the client credentials flow.
